mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (th.opponent_account) th.opponent_account AS opponentAccount, m.name AS opponentName, a.status AS accountStatus, th.created_at AS lastTransferredAt FROM transaction_history th JOIN account a ON th.opponent_account = a.account_number JOIN member m ON m.id = a.member_id WHERE th.account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY th.opponent_account, th.created_at DESC ) recent_targets ORDER BY lastTransferredAt DESC LIMIT 5;
